CHEMIST_INTRO.text:
Ever felt the need to use the same item in battle twice
in a single fight?

If so, consider bringing a Chemist with you.
We can duplicate items mid-combat.

SNOOPING_IMP.text:
Yowza! You scared me, sneaking up on me like that!
Yeesh!

What's that? Do I live here? Nope. I'm just snooping around.
How about you?

I guess we're both just a couple of snoops, eh?
Well, it's nice to meet a kindred spirit.

BAD_COOK_A.text:
My husband cooks the worst food I've ever eaten.
It tastes inconceivably bad.

MARTYR_INTRO.text:
When I meet someone new, I'm always curious to know
what makes them happiest in life.

It can vary dramatically from person to person. Good food...
True love... Inflicting pain... I've heard it all.

But for me, true happiness is...
Well. Take what's in the chest behind me.
I hope you'll understand.

ITEM_REMINDER.text:
At first, I was surprised that I could only hold one
of each item, but then I noticed my items refilled
at the end of combat.

I guess that means this one pot of cooking oil's gonna
last me a lifetime!

KNIGHT_INTRO.text:
As a knight, I just can't imagine giving my up shield
for a two-handed sword.

My husband says that makes me small-minded. I mean,
I guess it does. I should try to at least conceive of life
without a shield. For his sake.
It's no good. I can't do it.

FIGHTER_INTRO.text:
Weapons are important for a fighter! But it can be tough
to choose what to equip in each hand.

If I hold a sword in one hand a hammer in the other, then I can
use both sword and hammer skills...

But if I hold two hammers I'll deal more damage! Of course,
I'll only be able to use hammer skills...

INKEEPER_INTRO_TOWN_YES_MONEY.text: You're light. Get a few more CARO and come back.

INKEEPER_INTRO_TOWN.text:
Welcome to the inn.
It's 10 CARO for the night.

CULTIVATOR_INTRO.text:
If you can perceive of me, then you must be
a fellow cultivator.

See this resplendent peach? It's quite an auspicious thing.
Try consuming the next one you see in the wild.

The powers of the natural world shall course through
your body and fill your internal vessels with stores of
elemental energy.

With each attack, your body and weapon will channel
that elemental energy to produce profound effects.
Water heals you and your allies for a small amount.
Wood restores your own health considerably.
Fire increases your chance to hit enemy weak points.

Earth deals extra damage to the enemy.
The healthier they are, the more damage is inflicted.
Metal deals a small amount of damage to all enemies.

Ahh...! Truly, this peach is a wondrous thing.
Heed my advice and eat them without hesitation.

Not this one, though. It's mine.
You can't have it.

FARMER_INTRO.text:
Make sure to pick up any seeds you find lying around
on the ground. You'll never use them up,
so more seeds just means more types of crops.

Once your crops mature, they'll stick around until
you harvest them, so long as you don't plant
more than three of them.

They'll even stay good between battles, so don't fuss
that you need to use them as soon as they're ready.

Farming's all about planning and patience. Don't think about
what you need right this moment; think about what
you'll need, oh, say...

BUY_EQUIPMENT_REMINDER.text:
If you're heading outside, make sure you stop by the
stores here in town and stock up.

Fighting is a lot tougher when all you've got
is your slappers.

INTRO_NEARBY_ENEMIES.text:
Boy, I'm glad you beadles are here to help take
care of all those creeps roaming around outside
of town!

Nearby it's mostly slimes.
Individually, they're not much to write home about.

But let them gang up on you and your mama
better break out her cheaters.

HOMESICK_SLIME.text:
I should write home to my mama.
Let her know how I'm doing.

NEW_PLAYER_INTRO_SMALLTALK.text:
Bless you for your work patrolling
the pastures. It may not be exciting
but it's important. The people
rely on you.

INTRO_QUEST_CLERIC_CARAVAN.text: Done with patrols? Good on you.

INTRO_QUEST_CLERIC_PATROL.text:
Blessings and all that. Been out to visit
the pastures yet?

Daily patrols may not be glamorous,
but at least they're... Oh, Who am I
fooling? They suck.
Good thing they're your job, not mine!

...I guess I shouldn't say that, as a
cleric and all. 
Have fun!

NEW_PLAYER_INTRO.text:
All beadles are welcome here. Speaking of,
have you had a chance to meet any fellow beadles yet?

There are always brave folk willing to lay down
their lives to help those less fortunate.

My brother in the chancel above should
be able to introduce you to many
such beadles. Pray speak with him
before you leave.
